red_phase_verification_complete.description: Red-phase tests MUST fail for the correct reason (claim is false) — not due to typo, missing import, or framework error
red_phase_verification_complete.observable_check: execution_log contains red_phase_tests_run AND all_fail AND failure_is_correct_reason AND not_typo AND not_missing_import AND not_framework_error

green_phase_tests_pass_with_strong_oracl.description: Green-phase tests MUST pass because the implementation correctly realizes the claim, with strong oracle that would fail if claim were false
green_phase_tests_pass_with_strong_oracl.observable_check: execution_log contains green_tests_pass AND oracle_is_strong AND not_weak_oracle

build_clean_and_regression_pass.description: Lint, type check, build MUST pass after test changes, and existing regression suite MUST run alongside new tests
build_clean_and_regression_pass.observable_check: execution_log contains lint_run AND type_check_run AND build_run AND all_pass AND regression_tests_run AND all_regression_pass

verifies_red_before_green_and_contract_p.description: Agent MUST verify red tests fail correctly before green-phase implementation and verify interfaces/schemas/invariants are unchanged
verifies_red_before_green_and_contract_p.observable_check: execution_log contains red_tests_verified AND red_tests_fail_correctly AND contract_preserved AND signatures_unchanged AND schemas_unchanged

traces_real_integration_seam_and_claim_p.description: Agent MUST trace actual integration path through seam in real usage invocation and exercise the actual claim path not a surrogate
traces_real_integration_seam_and_claim_p.observable_check: execution_log contains seam_traced AND real_invocation_path AND not_mocked AND coverage_trace_shows_claim_path_exercised

performs_adversarial_self_check_and_docu.description: Agent MUST mentally audit every test for false-positive risk and document 'this test would fail if claim were false because [mechanism]' for each
performs_adversarial_self_check_and_docu.observable_check: execution_log contains adversarial_check_per_test AND false_positive_risk_evaluated AND weak_tests_fixed AND oracle_justification_form AND mechanism_stated_per_test

does_not_modify_oracle_to_make_tests_pas.description: Agent MUST NOT modify tests to pass instead of fixing the implementation
does_not_modify_oracle_to_make_tests_pas.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains test_modified AND implementation_not_fixed AND tests_pass)

does_not_mock_claim_seam_or_ship_weak_or.description: Agent MUST NOT mock integration seam the claim is about or ship tests where oracle could be true while claim is false
does_not_mock_claim_seam_or_ship_weak_or.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains mock_at_claim_seam OR (weak_oracle AND shipped_without_fix))

does_not_skip_regression_or_claim_partia.description: Agent MUST NOT run only new tests skipping existing regression suite, or claim integration complete when only happy path is verified
does_not_skip_regression_or_claim_partia.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains new_tests_run AND regression_exists AND regression_not_run OR (claims_complete_integration AND only_happy_path_tested))
